name: travel_expense_es_attempt28
description: Travel expense with per diem and costs (Spanish) - from attempt 28
prompt: Registre una nota de gastos de viaje para Miguel Pérez (miguel.perez@example.org) por "Visita cliente Tromsø". El viaje duró 5 días con dietas (tarifa diaria 800 NOK). Gastos: billete de avión 2600 NOK y taxi 800 NOK.
notes: Got 2/8 in production. Travel expense workflow was too minimal - no guidance on costs, per diem, travelDetails, costCategory, paymentType, rateCategory.
